_schema: One JSON line appended per session, at session end. Fields: ts (ISO local, Pacific), type (reconcile|quick|coaching|sunday|tutor|apply|system), reconciled (bool, did a reality-scan run), found_drift (bool, did the scan change anything), read (list of files consulted beyond memory.md), actions (short list of what was done), notes (one line). Consumed by the monthly system health check in /sunday. Keep every line one line.

actions: migrated Cowork prompt to CLAUDE.md + slash commands
